name: Pimento Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the soup and cheese until smooth.
2. Heat the mixture in a saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped eggs, salt, pepper, and butter to the soup.
4. Stir in the mushrooms with their juice.
5. Add the diced cooked chicken.
6. Cook gently until heated through but not boiling.
7. Stir in the cream about 10 minutes before serving.
Serve over Chinese noodles, in pastry shells or any dish you prefer.
